title: Curried Roast Chicken Noodle Soup
summary: Here's another recipe you can make with your batch-cooked slow-roasted curried coconut chicken. This chicken noodle soup is wholesome, warming, and absolutely delicious.

method.description: Make the Slow-Roasted Curried Coconut Chicken batch recipe.
Pick the coriander and finely mince the stalks.

Tip all the chicken liquor into a pan, top up with water or chicken stock until you have a total of 800ml of soup base. Add ½ of the onions in and the tomatoes. Stir the coriander stalks through. Shred the chicken thighs and add in to reheat.
Taste and season the soup with fish sauce, if needed. Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
Add the noodles into a bowl, pour over the soup, top with the veggies and chicken. Finish with a drizzle of chilli oil and serve with lime wedges.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
